Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover

Class AutoTacticRegistry

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.AutoTacticRegistry
All Implemented Interfaces:
IAutoTacticRegistry
public class AutoTacticRegistry extends Object implements IAutoTacticRegistry
Singleton class implementing the auto tactic registry.
See Also:
  • IAutoTacticRegistry

    Returns descriptors for all registered tactic combinators.

    Returns the dynamic tactic with the given id, or a placeholder if no dynamic tactic with the given id is provided at call time.

    Returns references to all the dynamic tactic providers that have been registered.

    Returns a reference to the dynamic tactic with the given id if it exists at call time, else a reference to a placeholder.

    Returns references to the dynamic tactics provided at call time.

  • Constructor Details

    • AutoTacticRegistry

      private AutoTacticRegistry()
      Private default constructor enforces that only one instance of this class is present.

  • Method Details

    • getTacticRegistry

      public static AutoTacticRegistry getTacticRegistry()
      Returns the singleton instance.

      Note: returns the instance type instead of the interface in order to provide non API methods to classes of this plug-in.

      Returns:
      the auto tactic registry

    • isRegistered

      public boolean isRegistered(String id)
      Description copied from interface: IAutoTacticRegistry
      Checks if a tactic extension with the given tactic id is present in the auto tactic registry.

      This is fully equivalent to Arrays.asList(getTacticIDs()).contains(tacticID), although implemented in a more efficient way.

      Specified by:
      isRegistered in interface IAutoTacticRegistry
      Parameters:
      id - the tactic id to check for
      Returns:
      true iff the given tactic id is known to the tactic registry

    • getRegisteredIDs

      public String[] getRegisteredIDs()
      Description copied from interface: IAutoTacticRegistry
      Returns the ids of all tactic extensions that have been registered.

      The order of the returned array is of no significance and may change across multiple calls of the method.

      Specified by:
      getRegisteredIDs in interface IAutoTacticRegistry
      Returns:
      an array of all registered tactic ids

    • getTacticDescriptor

      public ITacticDescriptor getTacticDescriptor(String id) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Description copied from interface: IAutoTacticRegistry
      Returns the tactic descriptor of the tactic extension with the given id.

      Clients should first use IAutoTacticRegistry.isRegistered(String) to check if a tactic extension with the given id is registered. In case no tactic extension with the given id has been registered a placeholder is returned. Place holder tactics always fail.

      Specified by:
      getTacticDescriptor in interface IAutoTacticRegistry
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the tactic
      Returns:
      the tactic descriptor of the tactic with the given id
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException

    • loadRegistry

      private void loadRegistry()
      Initializes the registry using extensions to the tactic extension point.

      private static boolean containsWhitespace(String str)
      Checks if a string contains a whitespace character
      Parameters:
      str - String to check for.
      Returns:
      true iff the string contains a whitespace character.

    • isRegisteredParameterizer

      public boolean isRegisteredParameterizer(String id)
      Description copied from interface: IAutoTacticRegistry
      Returns whether the given id corresponds to a registered tactic parameterizer.
      Specified by:
      isRegisteredParameterizer in interface IAutoTacticRegistry
      Parameters:
      id - a parameterizer id
      Returns:
      true if registered, false otherwise

    • getParameterizerDescriptors

      public IParameterizerDescriptor[] getParameterizerDescriptors()
      Description copied from interface: IAutoTacticRegistry
      Returns descriptors for all registered tactic parameterizers.

      The order of the returned array is of no significance and may change across multiple calls of the method.

      Specified by:
      getParameterizerDescriptors in interface IAutoTacticRegistry
      Returns:
      an array of instantiators

    • getParameterizerDescriptor

      public IParameterizerDescriptor getParameterizerDescriptor(String id)
      Description copied from interface: IAutoTacticRegistry
      Returns parameterizer descriptor with given id, or a placeholder if it is not registered.
      Specified by:
      getParameterizerDescriptor in interface IAutoTacticRegistry
      Parameters:
      id - a parameterizer id
      Returns:
      a parameterizer descriptor

    • isRegisteredCombinator

      public boolean isRegisteredCombinator(String id)
      Description copied from interface: IAutoTacticRegistry
      Returns whether the given id corresponds to a registered tactic combinator.
      Specified by:
      isRegisteredCombinator in interface IAutoTacticRegistry
      Parameters:
      id - a combinator id
      Returns:
      true if registered, false otherwise

    • getCombinatorDescriptors

      public ICombinatorDescriptor[] getCombinatorDescriptors()
      Description copied from interface: IAutoTacticRegistry
      Returns descriptors for all registered tactic combinators.

      The order of the returned array is of no significance and may change across multiple calls of the method.

      Specified by:
      getCombinatorDescriptors in interface IAutoTacticRegistry
      Returns:
      an array of combinator descriptors

    • getCombinatorDescriptor

      public ICombinatorDescriptor getCombinatorDescriptor(String id)
      Description copied from interface: IAutoTacticRegistry
      Returns combinator descriptor with given id, or a placeholder if it is not registered.
      Specified by:
      getCombinatorDescriptor in interface IAutoTacticRegistry
      Parameters:
      id - a combinator id
      Returns:
      a combinator descriptor

    • getDynTactics

      public ITacticDescriptor[] getDynTactics()

    • getDynTactic

      public ITacticDescriptor getDynTactic(String id)
      Returns the dynamic tactic with the given id, or a placeholder if no dynamic tactic with the given id is provided at call time.
      Parameters:
      id - a dynamic tactic id
      Returns:
      a tactic descriptor
      Since:
      3.0

    • getDynTacticRefs

      public IDynamicTacticRef[] getDynTacticRefs()
      Description copied from interface: IAutoTacticRegistry
      Returns references to the dynamic tactics provided at call time.

      The returned references will construct the dynamic tactic instance when ITacticDescriptor.getTacticInstance() is called, by fetching the dynamic tactic with the given id at call time.

      Specified by:
      getDynTacticRefs in interface IAutoTacticRegistry
      Returns:
      the dynamic tactic references

    • getDynTacticRef

      public IDynamicTacticRef getDynTacticRef(String id)
      Description copied from interface: IAutoTacticRegistry
      Returns a reference to the dynamic tactic with the given id if it exists at call time, else a reference to a placeholder.

      Even if the returned reference contains a placeholder, calling ITacticDescriptor.getTacticInstance() later on will fetch in this registry the dynamic tactic that is available at that moment.

      Specified by:
      getDynTacticRef in interface IAutoTacticRegistry
      Parameters:
      id - a dynamic tactic id
      Returns:
      a dynamic tactic reference

    • getDynTacticProviderRefs

      public Collection<TacticDescriptors.DynTacticProviderRef> getDynTacticProviderRefs()
      Returns references to all the dynamic tactic providers that have been registered.
      Returns:
      references to all the registered dynamic tactic providers
